capabilities.name: Certified structural welding (MIG/MAG, TIG, manual arc)
capabilities.fpLinkage: Enables 'structurally sound welded steel assemblies with repeatable quality' — DIN EN ISO 3834-2 certification anchors the quality commitment; DIN EN 1090-1/2 EXC2/EXC3 enables structural and safety-critical applications
constraints: Certified welders required — labor bottleneck if headcount shrinks
Machine-specific fixturing required for each new product geometry
DIN EN 1090 EXC3 scope limits some joint designs without pre-qualification

capabilities.name: Laser cutting & CNC nesting (flat sheet 2D profiles)
capabilities.fpLinkage: Enables precision-cut components for frame assembly — laser-cut flat sheet profiles (up to 3000×1500 mm, 1–20 mm thickness) are the input to all tube-frame products
constraints: Bed size limit 3000×1500 mm — oversized panels must be segmented
Shared machine time with contract work — scheduling conflicts under high contract load
2D flat sheet only — no 3D or tube laser capability currently

capabilities.name: CNC bending / forming (tube bending, press brake sheet forming)
capabilities.fpLinkage: Enables curved and angled structural elements (roof trusses, tube frames) — CNC-bent rectangular hollow sections are the primary structural members in both Heuraufe and Paddockbox
constraints: Tooling changeover required for different bend radii — reduces flexibility for short runs
Tube bending limited to standard RHS/SHS profiles available on market
Complex 3D compound bends not achievable with current machine park

capabilities.name: System integration — Baugruppen → Systemlösungen (complete assembly)
capabilities.fpLinkage: This IS the core transformation — from selling individual welds (Lohnfertigung) to selling complete products. Enables the full BOM: raw material in, finished product out. Without this, Böhmer remains a sub-tier supplier
constraints: Requires production planning, QC processes, and inventory management — all new processes for OEM business
Working capital required for buy-stock-produce-sell cycle (vs. current customer-material JIT model)
Batch scheduling must balance OEM production windows with ongoing contract business

capabilities.name: Equestrian domain expertise (shareholder family)
capabilities.fpLinkage: Ensures product design addresses actual stable operator needs — horse safety, tractor mobility, outdoor durability, multi-horse feeding behavior (Futterneid). Domain expertise is the origin of both product ideas and the reason the functional promise is well-specified
constraints: Tacit knowledge — not yet formalized into product requirements or design specs
Knowledge concentrated in Böhmer family; succession of this knowledge to team is unplanned
No formal equestrian user research or testing protocol beyond family experience

capabilities.name: Multi-material processing (S235/S355 steel, stainless steel, aluminum)
capabilities.fpLinkage: Material selection flexibility for corrosion/weight optimization — S355 for structural strength, stainless for corrosion-critical joints, aluminum for weight-sensitive components
constraints: Not differentiating vs. competitors — all comparable fabricators can process these materials
Stainless and aluminum require separate tooling and process controls to avoid cross-contamination with carbon steel

capabilities.name: Quality management system (ISO 9001:2015)
capabilities.fpLinkage: Enables repeatable product quality with documented process control — ISO 9001 certification provides the QMS framework that supports DIN EN ISO 3834-2 welding quality and DIN EN 1090 structural steel execution
constraints: Standard table-stakes capability — not differentiating vs. any certified fabricator
Ongoing audit and documentation cost; extends to new product lines once they enter series production

capabilities.name: Grinding, deburring & surface preparation (horse-safe edge finishing)
capabilities.fpLinkage: Critical for animal-contact products — no sharp edges or weld spatter on horse contact surfaces. Directly supports the 'safe for 15-year outdoor animal use' requirement in the functional promise
constraints: Labor-intensive, linear scaling — cannot be automated at Böhmer's current scale
Not differentiating vs. competitors; all equestrian equipment manufacturers must meet the same requirement

capabilities.name: Design engineering / technical drawing (CAD, in-house product development)
capabilities.fpLinkage: Enables in-house product development cycle — CAD drawings for product design and production fixtures. Required to produce technical files for CE certification and to iterate product geometry without external engineering cost
constraints: Limited to 2D / simple 3D — no parametric FEA or simulation capability in-house
Engineering resources are shared with contract work; OEM design tasks compete for time

combinations.name: Precision welded steel structures
combinations.targetApplications: Structural products requiring a complete cut-bend-weld sequence: any frame, enclosure, or load-bearing assembly from flat sheet and tube stock

combinations.name: Domain-informed complete products
combinations.targetApplications: Products designed with equestrian expertise and manufactured as complete systems — where the domain knowledge shapes the product spec and C4 delivers the finished unit

combinations.name: Horse-safe welded equipment
combinations.targetApplications: Animal-contact products requiring both certified structural welds (C1) and post-weld edge finishing (C8) to eliminate laceration and entrapment risk

combinations.name: Multi-material fabricated components
combinations.targetApplications: Products requiring mixed material processing — e.g., S355 main frame with stainless steel hardware inserts or aluminum trim components

trackATargets.description: Welded steel outdoor equipment for equestrian market
trackATargets.examples: Heuraufe (hay rack), Paddockbox (mobile paddock enclosure) — both products are direct C1+C2+C3+C4 applications. No new capability required.
Boxentrennwände (stall partition panels), Anbindebalken (tether rails), Sattelschränke (tack storage cabinets) — all are cut-bend-weld tube/sheet products within existing envelope
Tränken-Halterungen (water trough brackets), Futtertrog-Rahmen (feed trough frames), fence post sockets, ring anchors — small certified-weld + safe-edge items

trackBTargets.additionalCapabilityNeeded: Surface coating partner (hot-dip galvanizing + powder coat)
trackBTargets.adjacentUnits: Outdoor-rated equestrian equipment at ISO 12944 C3+ — required for any product sold into DACH outdoor equestrian market. This gap blocks market launch for both Heuraufe and Paddockbox.
Direct-to-customer product sales to Reitställe, Gestüte, and Pferdepensionen — requires trade fair presence, Fachhandel partnerships, or online catalog. Currently zero channel exists.
Custom equestrian facility construction — stable buildings, covered riding arenas (Reithallen), permanent paddock fencing systems. Requires engineering sign-off and construction management.

trackCTargets.coverageQuestion: Can Böhmer supply a complete installed equestrian facility — not just equipment but turnkey stable fitout including panels, fixtures, and installation? Requires field installation capability, project management, and structural engineering sign-off.
